g.text: "Welcome, traveler! You have stepped into the pocket universe of Saumil Prajapati."
"He is a developer, tech innovator, and alchemist who builds elegant startups."
"Every leaf, bloom, and item in this garden represents his creations."
"Take a look around the HUD to inspect his attributes and quests!"
